name: Mono Spark
explanation: A punchy, sub-heavy monophonic synthesizer in the classic ribbon-strip lineage. One main VCO blends a saw with a variable-width pulse (PWM) and is reinforced by a strong square SUB oscillator one and two octaves down plus a touch of noise, all driven into a snappy 4-pole resonant low-pass with its own decay envelope and an amp envelope. Last-note priority mono with a 4-note hold stack for tight chord stabs — built for weighty techno/acid basslines and zippy leads.
